name: Baltic Grid Crisis — State-backed actor compromises contractor VPN, SCADA system
brief: Baltic Grid Crisis — State-backed actor compromises contractor VPN, SCADA systems targeted, high tension 7.5
blue_objectives: Identify and revoke compromised contractor credentials
Protect OT/ICS systems from adversary lateral movement
Attribute adversary activity and coordinate with authorities
red_posture: State-sponsored actor using LOTL techniques. Maintains persistence via compromised credentials. Stealth priority. Escalation: hold and monitor Blue response.
